zh.Preston, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Woodville於1385年出生在英國肯特麥德斯同時，他的父親Sir John Wydeville44歲，母親Isabel Godard40歲。他於1403年與Joan Bedlisgate在英國肯特麥德斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年12月8日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉享年57歲，埋葬在英國肯特麥德斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Woodville于1385年出生在英国肯特麥德斯同时，他的父亲Sir John Wydeville44岁，母亲Isabel Godard40岁。他于1403年与Joan Bedlisgate在英国肯特麥德斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年12月8日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉享年57岁，埋葬在英国肯特麥德斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Woodville was born in 1385, in Maidstone, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Wydeville, was 44 and his mother, Isabel Godard, was 40. He married Joan Bedlisgate in 1403, in Maidstone, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 8 December 1442, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Maidstone, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Woodville est né en 1385, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wydeville, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabel Godard, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bedlisgate en 1403, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1442, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodvilleが1385年にイギリスケントメイドストーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Wydevilleは44歳，母Isabel Godardは40歳であった。1403年にイギリスケントメイドストーンでJoan Bedlisgateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年12月8日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスで57歳で死去し，イギリスケントメイドストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodville(이)가 1385년 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wydeville(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Godard(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에서 Joan Bedlisgate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Woodville nasceu em 1385, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wydeville, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Godard, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bedlisgate em 1403, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1442, em Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England: Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Woodville родился в 1385 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wydeville было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Godard, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bedlisgate в 1403 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 8 декабря 1442 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия.
